LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT DANIEL BORG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR AS UNTIMELY UNDER CCP 1005(B). THE MOTION WAS SERVED ON OCTOBER 10, 2013 AND FILED ON OCTOBER 10, 2013. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS , CSR # 12998 (302/MJM)
MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-30-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT DANIEL BORG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. THE DEMURRER WAS ORIGINALLY TAKEN OFF CALENDAR ON OCTOBER 30, 2013 AS UNTIMELY FILED. DEFENDANT HAS NOW FILED A DOCUMENT ENTITLED "RENOTICE OF DEMURRER AND DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, MOTION TO STRIKE," FILED OCTOBER 31, 2013. HOWEVER, IT APPEARS THAT DEFENDANT HAS SIMPLY FILED A NEW NOTICE OF DEMURRER AND DEMURRER, WITHOUT FILING AND RE-SERVING THE SUPPORTING PAPERS. THE NOTICE OF HEARING STATES THAT THE MOTION WILL BE BASED ON "THE MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, ALL DOCUMENTS, RECORDS AND PLEADINGS ON FILE," BUT THESE DO NOT APPEAR TO HAVE BEEN SERVED ON PLAINTIFF. IF DEFENDANT WISHES TO FILE THIS DEMURRER, HE MUST FILE AND SERVE ALL COPIES OF THE DOCUMENTS ON WHICH HE IS RELYING. (SEE CRC 3.1113.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: LAURA MARTINEZ, CSR #11332
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY DEFENDANT BORG, DANIEL

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Further Response To Written Interrogatories, And For Monetary Sanctions, Supporting Declaration Of John F. Lee
Off Calendar May-13-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
John F. Lee, Esq. (415-863-4336) for Daniel Borg, Defendant and moving party.
No other appearance on the matter.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT DANIEL BORG's Motion For Order Compelling Further Response To Written Interrogatories, And For Monetary Sanctions, Supporting Declaration Of John F. Lee: Motion to compel further responses to defendant's Special Interrogatories-13 and 6-32, is granted as unopposed. Verified responses shall be served within twenty days of the date of this Order. Sanctions in the sum of $500.00 are awarded to defendant as against plaintiff's counsel to be paid within twenty days of the date of this Order. Order is signed in Open Court. (see scanned order for details) Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported.=(302/JPT)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-17-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DANIEL BORG's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Overruled. The demurrer is untimely. (CCP 430.40(a).) On June 24, 2013, the Summons and Complaint were served by personal delivery on Mr. Borg. On December 17, 2013, Mr. Borg filed the instant demurrer. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-17-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. rULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DANIEL BORG's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is Denied. The motion to strike is untimely. (CCP 435(b)(1).) On June 24, 2013, the Summons and Complaint were served by personal delivery on Mr. Borg. On December 17, 2013, Mr. Borg filed the instant demurrer. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-31-2013 Continued To Mar-05-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-13-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: JOHN LEE, ESQ., 415.863.4336, FOR DEFENDANT DANIEL BORG; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DANIEL BORG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
is off calendar. The demurrer was originally taken off calendar on October 30, 2013 as untimely filed. Defendant has now filed a document entitled "Renotice of Demurrer and Demurrer to Complaint, Motion to Strike," filed October 31, 2013. However, it appears that Defendant has simply filed a new notice of demurrer and demurrer, without filing and re-serving the supporting papers. The Notice of Hearing states that the motion will be based on "the Memorandum of Points and Authorities, all documents, records and pleadings on file," but these do not appear to have been served on Plaintiff. If Defendant wishes to file this demurrer, he must file and serve all copies of the documents on which he is relying. (See CRC 3.1113.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Laura Martinez, CSR #11332

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-03-2013 Continued To Dec-13-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DANIEL BORG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS Continued to December 13, 2013 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than December 3, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-07-2013 Continued To Jan-15-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-30-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. JOHN F. LEE, TEL. NO. 863-4336, APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - LATE NOTICE WAS GIVEN TO CONTEST THE TENTATIVE RULING. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DANIEL BORG's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Off calendar as untimely under CCP 1005(b). The motion was served on October 10, 2013 and filed on October 10, 2013. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis , CSR # 12998 =(302/MJM)
